## Summary

<!-- one sentence: what was broken? -->

## Root cause

<!-- where did the bug originate? -->

## Fix

<!-- the smallest change that resolves it -->

## Regression test

<!-- the test that fails without this fix and passes with it -->

## Blast radius

- [ ] Localised to one module
- [ ] Crosses a data-zone boundary (verify contract)
- [ ] Touches production data (escalate)
